name: Parasomnia
short_description: Parasomnia is a horror game in the style of backrooms. The accompanying excellent visual will allow you to plunge into the nightmare happening around the hero. Mitya is not a fighter, he can only run. Realistic camera and sound complement your emotions.
detailed_description:
Parasomnia is a first-person horror in VHS format, your task is to get out alive! You are not a fighter, you can only run. In Parasomnia you have to make a choice where to turn, each choice will depend on what will be waiting for you on the other side

Features:

The real horror of survival: You are not a fighter - if you want to survive the horrors, our only chance is to escape... or hide
Exciting Graphics: AAA-quality graphics open up a detailed, terrifying world to players.
Unpredictable enemies: Players cannot know when and from where the terrifying inhabitant will overtake them.
